ast.name: textContent
ast.source: No choices match the current filter.
ast.target: 没有符合当前筛选条件的选项。

ast.source: No choices found in this package.
ast.target: 此包中未找到任何选项。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: No additional assets bundled with this package.
ast.target: 此包未捆绑任何额外资源。

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 启用（若无活动文件则跳过）

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 提供商 /v1/models（需要 API 密钥）

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 自动（尝试提供商，回退到 models.dev）

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Show updates only on major releases (new features, breaking changes)
ast.target: 仅在主要版本发布时显示更新（新功能、破坏性变更）

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Show updates on each new release
ast.target: 每次新版本发布时显示更新

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the global setting for this choice. 'Always' forces the one-page modal even if disabled globally; 'Never' disables it even if enabled globally.
ast.target: 覆盖此选项的全局设置。'始终' 强制使用单页模态框，即使全局禁用；'从不' 即使全局启用也禁用它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to arrange the new pane relative to the current one
ast.target: 如何相对于当前窗格排列新窗格

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to display the opened file

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Focus the opened tab immediately after opening
ast.target: 打开后立即将焦点切换到新打开的标签页

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Advanced / legacy: this executes any `<% %>` anywhere in the destination file (including inside code blocks).
ast.target: 高级/遗留功能：这会执行目标文件中任何位置的 `<% %>`（包括代码块内部）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls whether this Capture uses the current editor selection as {{VALUE}}. Does not affect {{SELECTED}}.
ast.target: 控制此捕获是否使用当前编辑器选区作为 {{VALUE}}。不影响 {{SELECTED}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative path. Supports format syntax (use trailing '/' for folders).
ast.target: 相对于保险库的路径。支持格式语法（文件夹请使用尾部 '/'）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a file, folder, or format syntax (e.g., {{DATE}})
ast.target: 选择文件、文件夹或格式语法（例如 {{DATE}}）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a card from the canvas below, or paste an exact node id.
ast.target: 从下方画布中选择一张卡片，或粘贴确切的节点 ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Formats the value as a task.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how QuickAdd should insert a link to the captured file in the current note.
ast.target: 选择 QuickAdd 应如何在当前笔记中插入指向捕获文件的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to place the link when appending
ast.target: 追加时链接的放置位置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether to insert a regular link or an embed when replacing the selection.
ast.target: 选择在替换选区时是插入常规链接还是嵌入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert capture after specified text. Accepts format syntax. Tip: use a heading (starts with #) to target a section. Blank line handling is configurable below.
ast.target: 在指定文本后插入捕获内容。接受格式语法。提示：使用标题（以 # 开头）来定位某个部分。空行处理可在下方配置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert captured content on the same line, immediately after the matched text (no newline added).
ast.target: 在同一行、紧接匹配文本之后插入捕获内容（不添加换行符）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replace everything after the matched text up to end-of-line.
ast.target: 替换匹配文本之后直到行尾的所有内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Place the text at the end of the matched section instead of the top.
ast.target: 将文本放置在匹配部分的末尾而非顶部。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Also include the section’s subsections (requires target to be a heading starting with #). Subsections are headings inside the section.
ast.target: 同时包含该部分的子部分（要求目标是以 # 开头的标题）。子部分是该部分内部的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates the 'insert after' line if it is not found.
ast.target: 如果未找到“插入在...之后”的行，则创建该行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the format of the capture.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create the file in the specified folder. If multiple folders are specified, you will be prompted for which folder to create the file in.
ast.target: 在指定文件夹中创建文件。如果指定了多个文件夹，系统将提示您选择在哪个文件夹中创建文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Get prompted to choose from both the selected folders and their subfolders when creating the note.
ast.target: 创建笔记时，提示您从选定的文件夹及其子文件夹中进行选择。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates the file in the same folder as the currently active file. Will not create the file if there is no active file.
ast.target: 在当前活动文件所在的文件夹中创建文件。如果没有活动文件，则不会创建文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how QuickAdd should insert a link to the created file in the current note.
ast.target: 选择 QuickAdd 应如何在当前笔记中插入指向创建文件的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether replacing the selection should insert a link or an embed.
ast.target: 选择替换选区时是插入链接还是嵌入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether QuickAdd should ask what to do, update the existing file, create another file, or keep the existing file.
ast.target: 选择 QuickAdd 应询问操作、更新现有文件、创建另一个文件还是保留现有文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enabling this will have the assistant use the prompt template you specify. If disable, the assistant will ask you for a prompt template to use.
ast.target: 启用此选项将使助手使用您指定的提示模板。如果禁用，助手将询问您要使用的提示模板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The model the AI Assistant will use
ast.target: AI 助手将使用的模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the variable used to store the AI Assistant output, i.e. {{value:output}}.
ast.target: 用于存储 AI 助手输出的变量名称，即 {{value:output}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The system prompt for the AI Assistant

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show advanced settings such as temperature, top p, and frequency penalty.
ast.target: 显示高级设置，如温度、top p 和频率惩罚。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sampling temperature. Higher values like 0.8 makes the output more random, whereas lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic. The default is 1.
ast.target: 采样温度。较高的值（如 0.8）会使输出更随机，而较低的值（如 0.2）会使其更集中和确定。默认值为 1。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Nucleus sampling - consider this an alternative to temperature. The model considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass. 0.1 means only tokens compromising the top 10% probability mass are considered. The default is 1.
ast.target: 核采样 - 可将其视为温度的替代方案。模型考虑 top_p 概率质量内的 token 结果。0.1 表示仅考虑构成前 10% 概率质量的 token。默认值为 1。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim. The default is 0.
ast.target: 正值会根据新 token 在文本中已有的频率对其进行惩罚，从而降低模型逐字重复相同行的可能性。默认值为 0。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics. The default is 0.
ast.target: 正值会根据新 token 是否在文本中出现过对其进行惩罚，从而增加模型谈论新话题的可能性。默认值为 0。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to the file. Supports formatting like {{DATE}}, {{VALUE}}, etc.
ast.target: 文件的路径。支持 {{DATE}}、{{VALUE}} 等格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose tab, split, window, or sidebar
ast.target: 选择标签页、分屏、窗口或侧边栏

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Bring the opened file to the foreground
ast.target: 将打开的文件带到前台

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add user script - type the name or click Browse
ast.target: 添加用户脚本 - 输入名称或点击浏览

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how this condition should be evaluated.
ast.target: 选择此条件应如何评估。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of the macro variable to inspect (without the $ prefix).
ast.target: 要检查的宏变量名称（不带 $ 前缀）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to compare the variable value.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to interpret the comparison value.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative path to the JavaScript file.
ast.target: 相对于保险库的 JavaScript 文件路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional export or member to call (use :: to access nested members).
ast.target: 可选的导出或要调用的成员（使用 :: 访问嵌套成员）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Execute this macro when Obsidian starts
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 启动时执行此宏

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shown in the choice picker search box when this multi choice opens. Leave blank to use the multi name.
ast.target: 当此多选打开时，在选择器搜索框中显示。留空则使用多选名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add will append new models. Replace will overwrite existing models with the selected list.
ast.target: 添加将追加新模型。替换将用所选列表覆盖现有模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create any custom endpoint (OpenAI-compatible or otherwise)
ast.target: 创建任何自定义端点（兼容OpenAI或其他）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The endpoint for the AI Assistant

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose where QuickAdd looks when browsing or syncing models for this provider.
ast.target: 选择QuickAdd在浏览或同步此提供商的模型时查找的位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The providers for the AI Assistant

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default model for the AI Assistant

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to your folder with prompt templates
ast.target: 提示模板文件夹的路径

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show status messages from the AI Assistant
ast.target: 显示来自AI助手的状态消息

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default system prompt for the AI Assistant

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Bundle or import QuickAdd automations as reusable packages.
ast.target: 将QuickAdd自动化打包或导入为可重用的包。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display release notes when a new version is installed. This includes new features, demo videos, and bug fixes.
ast.target: 安装新版本时显示发行说明。包括新功能、演示视频和错误修复。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a notification when content is captured successfully to confirm the operation completed.
ast.target: 当内容成功捕获时显示通知，以确认操作完成。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a notification when an input prompt is cancelled without submitting. Disable this to avoid extra notices when dismissing prompts.
ast.target: 当输入提示被取消而未提交时显示通知。禁用此项可避免在关闭提示时出现额外通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, template variables in front matter will be formatted as proper Obsidian property types. Arrays become List properties, numbers become Number properties, booleans become Checkbox properties, etc. This is a beta feature that may have edge cases.
ast.target: 启用后，前置内容中的模板变量将被格式化为适当的Obsidian属性类型。数组变为列表属性，数字变为数字属性，布尔值变为复选框属性等。这是一个可能存在边缘情况的测试版功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use multi-line input prompt instead of single-line input prompt
ast.target: 使用多行输入提示代替单行输入提示

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep drafts when closing input prompts so they can be restored on reopen. Drafts are stored only for this session.
ast.target: 关闭输入提示时保留草稿，以便重新打开时可以恢复。草稿仅在此会话期间存储。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, Capture uses the current editor selection as {{VALUE}} and may skip the prompt. When disabled, Capture always prompts for {{VALUE}}.
ast.target: 启用后，捕获将使用当前编辑器选区作为{{VALUE}}，并可能跳过提示。禁用后，捕获始终会提示输入{{VALUE}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to the folder where templates are stored. Used to suggest template files when configuring QuickAdd.
ast.target: 存储模板的文件夹路径。用于在配置QuickAdd时建议模板文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Experimental. Resolve variables up front and show a single dynamic form before executing Template/Capture choices. See Advanced → One-page Inputs in docs.
ast.target: 实验性功能。预先解析变量，并在执行模板/捕获选项前显示单个动态表单。请参阅文档中的高级 → 单页输入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shortcodes for natural language date parsing. One per line: alias = phrase. Example: tm = tomorrow.
ast.target: 用于自然语言日期解析的短代码。每行一个：别名 = 短语。示例：tm = 明天。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add QuickAdd icon to the sidebar ribbon. Requires a reload.
ast.target: 将QuickAdd图标添加到侧边栏功能区。需要重新加载。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The string used to join multiple LLM responses together. The default is a newline.
ast.target: 用于连接多个LLM响应的字符串。默认为换行符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The string used to separate chunks of text. The default is a newline.
ast.target: 用于分隔文本块的字符串。默认为换行符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The maximum number of tokens in each chunk, calculated as the chunk token size + prompt template token size + system prompt token size. Make sure you leave room for the model to respond to the prompt.
ast.target: 每个块中的最大令牌数，计算方式为块令牌大小 + 提示模板令牌大小 + 系统提示令牌大小。请确保为模型响应提示留出空间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Merge chunks together by putting them in the same prompt, until the max tokens limit is reached. Useful for sending fewer queries overall, but may result in less coherent responses.
ast.target: 通过将块放入同一提示中来合并块，直到达到最大令牌限制。有助于减少总体查询次数，但可能导致响应连贯性降低。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Run Templater on entire destination file after capture
ast.target: 捕获后在整个目标文件上运行Templater

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use editor selection as default value
ast.target: 使用编辑器选区作为默认值

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Create file if it doesn't exist
ast.target: 如果文件不存在则创建

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用给定模板创建文件。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Create in same folder as active file
ast.target: 在与活动文件相同的文件夹中创建

ast.name: setName
ast.source: If the target file already exists

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Format template variables as proper property types (Beta)
ast.target: 将模板变量格式化为正确的属性类型（测试版）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use editor selection as default Capture value
ast.target: 使用编辑器选区作为默认捕获值

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 禁用 AI 和在线功能

ast.source: Filter by card text, file path, or node id…
ast.target: 按卡片文本、文件路径或节点 ID 筛选…

ast.target: 按名称或 ID 筛选

t = today

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Canvas note: 'At cursor' and 'New line above/below cursor' are not supported for Canvas card capture. Use top, bottom, or insert-after placement.
ast.target: 画布笔记：画布卡片捕获不支持“在光标处”和“在光标上方/下方新建行”。请使用顶部、底部或插入后放置。

ast.source: Create file if it doesn't exist
ast.target: 如果文件不存在则创建

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Target canvas file was not found.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Open the target canvas and select exactly one card to use this action.
ast.target: 请打开目标画布并选择恰好一张卡片以使用此操作。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Canvas nodes are still loading. Wait a moment and try again.
ast.target: 画布节点仍在加载中。请稍候片刻后重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not copy node id automatically.
ast.target: 无法自动复制节点 ID。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Consider subsections requires the target to be a heading (starts with #)
ast.target: “考虑子章节”要求目标是标题（以 # 开头）

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有选择要导入的模型。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Custom provider added. Click Edit to configure.
ast.target: 已添加自定义提供商。点击“编辑”进行配置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Select at least one choice to export.
ast.target: 请至少选择一个选项以导出。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Package copied with warnings. Review details below.
ast.target: 包已复制但存在警告。请查看下方详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Enter a file path before saving.
ast.target: 保存前请输入文件路径。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Package saved with warnings. Review details below.
ast.target: 包已保存但存在警告。请查看下方详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This package has already been imported.

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 请先加载一个包再导入。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Canvas capture skipped link insertion because no Markdown editor is focused.
ast.target: 画布捕获跳过了链接插入，因为没有聚焦的 Markdown 编辑器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Adds the template content to the end of the existing file.
ast.target: 将模板内容添加到现有文件的末尾。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Adds the template content to the beginning of the existing file.
ast.target: 将模板内容添加到现有文件的开头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replaces the existing file content with the template.
ast.target: 用模板内容替换现有文件内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Changes trailing digits only. Example: Draft009.md -> Draft010.md.
ast.target: 仅更改尾随数字。示例：Draft009.md -> Draft010.md。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keeps the original name and adds a duplicate marker. Example: Project Plan.md -> Project Plan (1).md.
ast.target: 保留原始名称并添加重复标记。示例：Project Plan.md -> Project Plan (1).md。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Leaves the file unchanged and opens the existing file.
ast.target: 保持文件不变并打开现有文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use QuickAdd template folder instead of Obsidian templates plugin folder / Templater templates folder.
ast.target: 使用 QuickAdd 模板文件夹，而不是 Obsidian 模板插件文件夹 / Templater 模板文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 'Increment file name' setting moved to 'Set default behavior if file already exists' setting
ast.target: “递增文件名”设置已移至“设置文件已存在时的默认行为”设置

ast.name: description
ast.source: Re-run template file collision normalization for users with older migration state
ast.target: 为迁移状态较旧的用户重新运行模板文件冲突规范化

ast.name: description
ast.source: Repair template file collision settings that may have been left in legacy format
ast.target: 修复可能遗留为旧格式的模板文件冲突设置

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mutual exclusion of insertAfter and writeToBottomOfFile settings. If insertAfter is enabled, writeToBottomOfFile is disabled. To support changes in settings UI.
ast.target: insertAfter 和 writeToBottomOfFile 设置互斥。如果启用 insertAfter，则禁用 writeToBottomOfFile。以支持设置 UI 的更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Set version to the current plugin version.
ast.target: 将版本设置为当前插件版本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add default AI providers to the settings.
ast.target: 向设置中添加默认 AI 提供商。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Remove macro indirection - embed macros directly in macro choices
ast.target: 移除宏间接引用 - 将宏直接嵌入宏选项中

ast.name: description
ast.source: Migrate legacy openFileInNewTab settings to new fileOpening format
ast.target: 将旧版 openFileInNewTab 设置迁移到新的 fileOpening 格式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Backfill missing file opening defaults for older choices
ast.target: 回填旧选项缺失的文件打开默认设置

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ensure every AI provider has a discovery mode so browsing works without models.dev
ast.target: 确保每个AI提供商都有发现模式，以便在没有models.dev的情况下也能浏览

ast.name: description
ast.source: Move AI provider API keys into Obsidian SecretStorage
ast.target: 将AI提供商API密钥移至Obsidian SecretStorage
